Flights / Vuelos

Copa Airlines · ZIPAIR · HK Express · Spring Japan

Flights / Vuelos

← Back to overview / Volver al inicio

Confirmed Flights / Vuelos Confirmados

Outbound / Ida — Sep 1–3

✅ Leg 1: BOG → PTY — Copa Airlines CM416

| Detail | Info | |——–|——| | Date | Tuesday, Sep 1, 2026 | | Departure | 11:39 AM — El Dorado (BOG) | | Arrival | 1:23 PM — Tocumen (PTY) | | Duration | 1h 44m | | Aircraft | Boeing 737-800 | | Confirmation | ** | | Passenger | ** |

Escala en Panama: 4h 45m

✅ Leg 2: PTY → SFO — Copa Airlines CM382

| Detail | Info | |——–|——| | Date | Tuesday, Sep 1, 2026 | | Departure | 6:08 PM — Tocumen (PTY) | | Arrival | 11:40 PM — San Francisco (SFO) | | Duration | 7h 32m | | Aircraft | Boeing 737 MAX 9 | | Confirmation | ** | | Passenger | ** |

Noche en SFO. Travelodge by Wyndham SFO Airport North.

✅ Leg 3: SFO → NRT — ZIPAIR ZG025

| Detail | Info | |——–|——| | Date | Wednesday, Sep 2, 2026 | | Departure | 5:15 PM — San Francisco (SFO) | | Arrival | 8:00 PM +1 day — Narita (NRT), Thu Sep 3 | | Confirmation | ** | | Seats | ** | | All passengers | ** |

Check-in cierra 1 hora antes (4:15 PM). Solo tarjeta de credito a bordo, no efectivo.

Return / Regreso — Sep 20–21

✅ Leg 7: NRT → SFO — ZIPAIR ZG026

| Detail | Info | |——–|——| | Date | Sunday, Sep 20, 2026 | | Departure | 9:30 PM JST — Narita (NRT) | | Arrival | 3:15 PM PDT — San Francisco (SFO), same day | | Duration | 9h 45m | | Confirmation | ** | | Seats | ** |

Cruza la linea internacional de fecha. Llegas el mismo dia calendario. ⚠️ Same-day connection desde PEK→NRT (Spring Japan 10:45 AM). 6h buffer en Narita.

✅ Leg 8: SFO → PTY — Copa Airlines CM383

| Detail | Info | |——–|——| | Date | Monday, Sep 21, 2026 | | Departure | 1:12 AM — San Francisco (SFO) | | Arrival | 10:27 AM — Tocumen (PTY) | | Aircraft | Boeing 737-900 | | Confirmation | ** |

Escala en PTY: 1h 22m

✅ Leg 9: PTY → BOG — Copa Airlines CM415

| Detail | Info | |——–|——| | Date | Monday, Sep 21, 2026 | | Departure | 11:49 AM — Tocumen (PTY) | | Arrival | 1:29 PM — El Dorado (BOG) | | Duration | 1h 40m | | Aircraft | Boeing 737-800 | | Confirmation | ** |

Pending Flights / Vuelos Pendientes

Estos vuelos aun no estan reservados. Los precios son estimados (investigacion Mar 2026).

⬜ Leg 4: KIX → HKG — Osaka to Hong Kong

| Detail | Info | |——–|——| | Date | Friday, Sep 11, 2026 | | Best option | HK Express — 2:25 PM → 5:35 PM (4h 10m, non-stop) | | Price | ~COP 492,621 (~$117/person) | | Alt cheaper | Peach Aviation 8:40 PM → 11:55 PM (~$104/person, but midnight arrival) | | Alt other | Hong Kong Airlines 9:55 AM → 1:10 PM (price N/A, but very early from Kyoto) | | Status | ⬜ TBD |

HK Express 2:25 PM es ideal — da tiempo para Nara por la manana y Haruka a KIX. Llega HK 5:35 PM, tren a Shenzhen 14 min mas.

⬜ Leg 5: HKG → PEK — Hong Kong to Beijing

| Detail | Info | |——–|——| | Date | Thursday, Sep 17, 2026 | | Best option | TBD — afternoon flight ~3h 25m non-stop | | Price | est. ~COP 1,098,170 (~$261/person) | | Status | ⬜ TBD |

Vuelo de la tarde. Salen de Shenzhen temprano, tren a West Kowloon (14 min), Airport Express a HKG. Llegan Beijing ~8:25 PM.

⬜ Leg 6: PEK → NRT — Beijing to Tokyo Narita

| Detail | Info | |——–|——| | Date | Sunday, Sep 20, 2026 | | Best option | Spring Japan — 10:45 AM → 3:30 PM (3h 45m, non-stop) | | Price | ~COP 2,464,805 (~$587/person for 2 adults) | | Status | ⬜ TBD |

⚠️ SAME-DAY CONNECTION: PEK→NRT llega 3:30 PM. ZIPAIR NRT→SFO sale 9:30 PM. Buffer de 6 horas. Boletos SEPARADOS — si Spring Japan se retrasa, ZIPAIR no espera. Salir del hotel ~8 AM.

2 PTY → SFO Copa CM382 Sep 1 ✅ Confirmed
3 SFO → NRT ZIPAIR ZG025 Sep 2 ✅ Confirmed
4 KIX → HKG HK Express (TBD) Sep 11 ⬜ Pending
5 HKG → PEK TBD Sep 17 ⬜ Pending
6 PEK → NRT Spring Japan (TBD) Sep 20 ⬜ Pending

8 SFO → PTY Copa CM383 Sep 21 ✅ Confirmed
9 PTY → BOG Copa CM415 Sep 21 ✅ Confirmed

All Trains / Todos los Trenes

Todos los ninos menores de 6 anos viajan GRATIS en trenes de Japon y China (en el regazo del adulto, sin asiento propio).

🇯🇵 Japan Trains / Trenes Japon

# Route Train Duration Cost (2 adults) Where to buy (cheapest first)
1 NRT → Ueno Narita Skyliner (Keisei) 40 min ¥4,620 (~$29) Keisei e-ticket · Klook
2 Tokyo metro Suica/PASMO IC Card — ~¥6,400 (~$40) est. Load at station machines or konbini
3 Tokyo → Nagoya Shinkansen Nozomi 1h 40m ~¥22,200 (~$139) SmartEX app (Hayatoku 21 = 20% off!)
4 Nagoya → Kyoto Shinkansen Nozomi 35 min ~¥10,880 (~$68) SmartEX app
5 Kyoto ↔ Nara JR Miyakoji Rapid 45 min ¥2,880 RT (~$18) Suica IC card at gate (no advance booking)
6 Kyoto → KIX Haruka Express (JR West) 75 min ¥4,400 (~$28) JR West tourist ticket ⚠️ MUST buy online before trip!
  JAPAN TOTAL     ~¥48,980 (~$306)  

🇨🇳 China Trains / Trenes China

# Route Train Duration Cost (2 adults, 2nd class) Where to buy (cheapest first)
7 HKG → Shenzhen High-speed (West Kowloon → Futian) 14 min CNY 136 (~$20) MTR · Trip.com
8 SZ North → Guilin Tren G 2h 40m CNY 493–784 (~$71–113) 12306.cn (NO fee) · Trip.com (+fee)
9 Guilin → SZ North Tren G 3h CNY 493–784 (~$71–113) 12306.cn · Trip.com
10 Shenzhen → HKG High-speed (Futian → West Kowloon) 14 min CNY 136 (~$20) MTR · Trip.com
  CHINA TOTAL     ~CNY 1,258–1,840 (~$182–266)  

Where to Buy — Cheapest / Donde Comprar — Mas Barato

Japan / Japon

| Platform | What | Price | Notes | |———-|——|——-|——-| | SmartEX | Shinkansen (Nozomi/Hikari) | CHEAPEST — Hayatoku 21 = 20% off | App accepts international cards. Book 21+ days ahead | | Keisei e-ticket | Narita Skyliner | CHEAPEST — ¥2,310 vs ¥2,580 at station | Buy online, show QR code at gate | | JR West online | Haruka Express | CHEAPEST — ¥2,200 tourist price (vs ¥3,430 at station) | ⚠️ Must buy online BEFORE trip! | | Klook | All above | Same price or similar | Sometimes has promo codes |

⚠️ NO comprar JR Pass. Para nuestra ruta cuesta ¥50,000/adulto vs ~¥24,490 en boletos individuales.

China / China

| Platform | What | Price | Notes | |———-|——|——-|——-| | 12306.cn | All China trains | CHEAPEST — face value, NO fee | Register with passport (takes 1-2 days) | | MTR High Speed | West Kowloon ↔ Shenzhen | Face value | Book online or at station | | Trip.com trains | All China trains | Face value + CNY 15-30 fee/ticket | Easier for foreigners |

12306.cn es el mas barato. Registrarse AHORA para tener la cuenta lista.

Suica/PASMO IC Card

  • Get at: Narita Airport (Welcome Suica at JR East counter/machines)
  • Cost: No deposit for Welcome Suica (valid 28 days). Load ¥3,000–5,000 each
  • Load at: JR station machines, konbinis (7-Eleven, Lawson, FamilyMart)
  • Works in: Tokyo, Nagoya, Kyoto, Nara — all Japan
  • Uses: Trains, buses, konbinis, vending machines, coin lockers

Booking Timeline / Cuando Comprar

When / Cuando Action / Accion
Now / Ahora Download SmartEX app + register. Register on 12306.cn with passport
Aug 1 (~5 weeks before) Buy Skyliner e-tickets (Keisei). Buy Haruka tourist tickets (JR West online)
Aug 8 (~4 weeks before) Book Shinkansen Tokyo→Nagoya + Nagoya→Kyoto on SmartEX (Hayatoku 21)
Aug 29 (15 days before Sep 13) Book SZ North→Guilin on 12306.cn (tickets open 15 days before)
Sep 1 (15 days before Sep 16) Book Guilin→SZ North on 12306.cn
At Narita (Sep 4) Get Welcome Suica cards at airport

Alvarez-Rincon Family · Sep 1–21, 2026 · BOG → SFO → Japan → China → SFO → BOG
